title: Westminster Insight Day
headings: h2: News Advice and support Contact
text_excerpt: --> Westminster Insight Day top of page About All news Advice More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. All Posts Newsletter News Search Westminster Insight Day Apr 21 1 min read I am running a Westminster Insight Day to bring local young people to Parliament to learn more about our politics and democracy. I previously ran one over the February half term and received overwhelmingly positive feedback - 100% of attendees said that they would recommend the Insight Day to a friend. The day will give young people an opportunity to learn about Parliament as well as contribute to my work as an MP and gain first-hand experience of Westminster politics. Please note, the Insight Day is only available to young people aged 16-19 who either live or go to school in my constituency (you can check with your postcode here: Find your MP - MPs and Lords - UK Parliament ). We have limited spaces due to capacity and will be operating on a first-come first-served basis - but do not worry as I will plan to hold other events later in the year. If you would like to be prioritised for future events, please email ruth.cadbury.mp@parliament.uk Details: 28th May 2026, 9am - 5pm House of Commons, SW1A 0AA Sign up here (the form will close once full or on 5th May): https://caroline3853.wixforms.com/f/7443255606430926777 Tags: Constituency Parliament Recent Posts See All Newsletter - April 2026 Tribute to Cllr Jagdish Sharma Newsletter - March 2026 Home News Advice and support Contact © Ruth Cadbury MP 2025 Privacy Policy Useful Information Useful Contacts Immigration Universal Credit Behaviour Policy Archive Archive News Archive Video News Archive Newsletters bottom of page
